role.name: database
role.purpose: Owns Prisma schema, migrations, and seed data. Ensures multi-tenant model integrity, PII field annotations, and safe migration practices.

conventions: All models containing patient data MUST include tenantId foreign key and PII/encryption annotations.
Migrations must be backwards-compatible where possible. Destructive migrations require human approval.
Seed data must use synthetic/fake data only. Never use real patient data, SSNs, or PII.
Strict TypeScript with no 'any' types in seed scripts or utility code.
Log all schema changes and migrations to the ledger so the backend agent can pick up new Prisma types.
Any changes affecting PII fields or encryption annotations require human approval.
forbidden_actions: Using real patient data in seed scripts
Modifying PII fields or encryption annotations without human approval
